hooks.command: case "$PWD" in */worktrees/*) exit 0 ;; esac; command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 && repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$repo" ] && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "$repo" 2>/dev/null || true

command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 && repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$repo" ] && code-review-graph status --repo "$repo" 2>/dev/null || echo 'code-review-graph: skipping (graph unavailable or not a git repo)'
